items.claim: Alvin Hines had a visible loss of muscle tissue and looked worse physically without steroids.
items.quote: visible loss of muscle tissue, man. Big time. I said he had tits. HE'S GOT TITTIES AT WEIGH-INS

items.claim: Alvin Hines' durability is not as good off steroids, leading to him getting caught early.
items.quote: They said Hines off the steroids durability is not going to be as good. And sure enough, he gets caught early and the fight ended

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is slicker on the feet than Cody Gibson with knockout power and good combinations.
items.quote: feel like he's slicker on the feet than Cody Gibson and his grappling being a capable threat.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and coming off two straight losses by finish.
items.quote: 38 years old coming off two straight losses by finish and the last one was a quick KO loss to Archi Long.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is five inches taller than Abdul Hussein.
items.quote: He's tall, too. Five inches taller, which I think is a factor

items.claim: Abdul Hussein controls the lead hand well in the southpaw stance, which is how he knocked out Tyson Nam.
items.quote: When he stands in the southpaw stance like he did against Tyson Nom, he controls that lead hand real well... That's how he knocked Tyson Nam out.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's grappling was competitive when he fought Mohamed Mokaev, scoring takedowns in back-and-forth exchanges.
items.quote: His grappling was competitive with Mohamed Makaya. He was scoring some takedowns. They were they were exchanging back and forth

items.claim: Nursulton Ruziboev has nine wins by decision and has never finished a fight inside the UFC.
items.quote: Nine wins by decision. Never finished the fight inside the UFC.
